mapper.select: select ep.id, ep.name, ep.paper_id, p.name as paper_name, ep.start_time, ep.end_time, ( select count(1) from exam_plan_examinee epe inner join examinee e on e.id = epe.examinee_id where epe.exam_plan_id = ep.id and e.deleted = 0 and e.status = 'ENABLED' ) as effective_examinee_count, ep.status, ep.updated_at from exam_plan ep inner join paper p on p.id = ep.paper_id and p.deleted = 0 where order by ep.id asc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from exam_plan ep where

select ep.id, ep.name, ep.paper_id, p.name as paper_name, p.duration_minutes as paper_duration_minutes, ep.start_time, ep.end_time, ep.status, ep.remark, ( select count(1) from exam_plan_examinee epe inner join examinee e on e.id = epe.examinee_id where epe.exam_plan_id = ep.id and e.deleted = 0 and e.status = 'ENABLED' ) as effective_examinee_count, ( select count(1) from exam_plan_examinee epe left join examinee e on e.id = epe.examinee_id where epe.exam_plan_id = ep.id and (e.id is null or e.deleted <> 0 or e.status <> 'ENABLED') ) as invalid_examinee_count, ep.updated_at from exam_plan ep inner join paper p on p.id = ep.paper_id and p.deleted = 0 where ep.id = #{planId} and ep.deleted = 0
select count(1) from exam_plan_examinee epe inner join examinee e on e.id = epe.examinee_id where epe.exam_plan_id = #{planId} and e.deleted = 0 and e.status = 'ENABLED'
